name: Geometric Luxe Hex Accent Table: White Stone Top, No Assembly - Threshold™
description:
Make an eye-catching focal point in your living room with this Geometric Luxe Hex Accent Table from Threshold™. Featuring a modern hexagonal silhouette, this accent table boasts a two-tier design with a white stone tabletop. It stands on sleek brass-finished metal legs atop a hexagonal open base and includes a geometric open shelf enclosed by the legs. Use it to display decor or as a stylish side table for drinks, snacks and more.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Width: 18"
Height: 22.25"
Top Thickness: 0.63"
Distance between shelf and bottom pipe: 4.88"
